name: quality-corpus
description: A small validation corpus assembled from preserved pipeline runs to compare OCR normalization and structural reasoning across dense, noisy, and multiline-heavy layouts.

samples.notes: Canonical multiline-heavy reference snapshot with a validated ownership propagation path.
Dense header and weak-line heavy run with many ambiguous mappings.
Balanced scan with mostly strong matches and a larger unmatched-label tail.
Mixed-layout sample with both line and weak-line candidates.
Noisy OCR sample with substantial ambiguity and token fragmentation.
Sparse-output variant used to check stability when diagnostics are incomplete.
